item.title: Families Defend Disability Services Amid Medicaid Cuts

item.title: Medicaid Is Paying for More Dental Care. GOP Cuts Threaten To Reverse the Trend.

item.title: ICE, ALS, Addiction Medicine, and Robotic Ultrasounds: Journalists Sound Off on All That and More
item.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national and local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

item.title: A Canadian Hospital Scoops Up Nurses Who No Longer Feel Safe in Trump’s America
item.description: Get our weekly newsletter, The Week in Brief, featuring a roundup of our original coverage, Fridays at 2 p.m. ET.

item.title: To Avoid Care Disruptions, Know When the Clock Runs Out on Your Prior Authorization
item.description: A Massachusetts woman knew the medicine her doctor prescribed required preauthorization, but she didn’t realize the approval had an expiration date. I...
